description_long: This is a striking, openwork crown or tiara crafted from black metal, featuring a bold zigzag geometric pattern that forms the main structure. The band is composed of three parallel zigzag strips, giving it a layered and dimensional appearance. At the front, a large, faceted, deep purple gemstone is set in a hexagonal bezel, serving as the focal point of the piece. The metalwork is sleek and angular, with pointed ends that add a dramatic flair to the overall design. The open spaces between the zigzag lines create a sense of lightness despite the strong visual impact. The combination of the dark metal and the rich purple gemstone gives the jewelry a modern, almost gothic elegance.
description: A black metal tiara with a bold zigzag geometric pattern and a large purple gemstone centerpiece, exuding a modern, dramatic style.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the layered zigzag bands and the prominent purple gemstone set at the front.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the open back and the pointed, tapering ends of the zigzag bands, with the gemstone setting visible at the far side.
description_view_2: This side angle emphasizes the open structure and the sharp, angular points of the zigzag design, with the gemstone on the right.
description_view_3: The front view centers on the large hexagonal purple gemstone and the symmetrical zigzag pattern radiating from it.
